title: ornithogalum pyrenaicum subsp. narbonense
intro: Ornithogalum pyrenaicum subsp. narbonense, also known as Narbonensis Star of Bethlehem, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It is a perennial bulbous geophyte that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Ornithogalum pyrenaicum subsp. narbonense can be made into tinctures, infusions, and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
